title: Check Domain and Virtualhost on Mittwald
description: Check domain and virtualhost configuration on Mittwald hosting.
prompt: I need to check my domain configuration on Mittwald including virtualhosts. Use the Mittwald MCP tools to list my projects, domains, and virtualhosts.

I need to enable HTTPS for my website. Can you help me set up an SSL certificate for my domain? I want to use Let's Encrypt for free automatic certificates. Use the available Mittwald MCP tools to complete this - discover any needed information yourself and make reasonable choices for parameters I didn't specify. Do not ask me questions - just use the tools to get it done.
